iterations.strategy: Root cause is a parallelism/plan mismatch: dim_filter dominates (222ms of ~310ms) due to a single-thread full scan over 59,986,052 lineitem rows (~720MB sequential read), while later phases are minor. Strategy categories D+A: parallelize the lineitem grouped reduction by partitioning scan work across threads with boundary-safe segment merge, and eliminate redundant work by reusing Phase-A per-order sum_qty in the final projection instead of a second lineitem join/probe pass.
